name: Nx Cloud
description: Remote computation caching and distributed task execution service for Nx monorepos. Speeds up CI by sharing build artifacts across machines and eliminating redundant work.

seo.title: Nx Cloud — Monorepo & Build Systems
seo.meta_description: Nx Cloud: Remote computation caching and distributed task execution service for Nx monorepos. Speeds up CI by sharing build artifacts across machines and elimin

when_to_use: Remote computation caching for Nx monorepo CI runs
Distributed task execution across multiple CI agents
Skip redundant builds using cached affected artifacts
Shared build cache between developer machines and CI

pros: Remote caching makes Nx CI dramatically faster
Distributed task execution spreads work across agents
Tight integration with Nx Console and dashboards
Generous free tier for smaller repos
cons: Pricing scales aggressively for large repos
Lock-in to Nx conventions and tooling
Cloud-hosted default; self-hosting is premium tier
review.verdict: Essential if you are all-in on Nx at scale, but watch the bill and the vendor lock-in before expanding.
review.best_for: JS and TS monorepos using Nx with slow CI and many projects
review.not_for: Non-Nx stacks or teams priced out at scale

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier, no explicit peak-lock evidence

lock_in.reason: Cache service for Nx, works with OSS Nx
